Fakülte

Üsküdar University Video Editing and Coloring Workshop has all the necessary equipment for documentaries, short films and TV programs that our students prepare for competitions. The Video Editing and Coloring Workshop is located on the 4th floor of Block C-D, South Campus and is sound and light insulated. In this way, the right environment is provided for the students who work here to make good sound editing and correct color choices.

Purpose of the Video Editing and Coloring Workshop

All events related to Üsküdar University such as seminars, interviews, ceremonies and concerts on or off campus are filmed and edited by the students of the Faculty of Communication and published on Üsküdar University's social media channels. In the workshop, students can also make color corrections for medium and feature-length projects, record sound for voiceover and quickly complete the rendering of their films. The Video Editing and Coloring Workshop is also used for the professional completion of video recording and editing works to be carried out within the projects carried out with many institutions, especially ISTKA and Development Agency.

Possibilities of Use of Video Editing and Colorization Workshop

Equipment that can be used by our students for projects is also provided to our students by the Faculty of Communication. Students who have sufficient camera skills, editing knowledge, sound and lighting design can use the Video Editing and Colorization Workshop to carry out professional editing work.
